news.news: Gilead Sciences received all required regulatory approvals to proceed with its acquisition of Arcellx, a company developing anito-cel, a CAR-T cell therapy for multiple myeloma. The tender offer was extended to April 27, 2026, with a purchase price of $115.00 per share plus contingent value rights tied to future sales milestones.

UCB announced a definitive agreement to acquire Neurona Therapeutics for up to $1.15 billion to advance regenerative cell therapies for epilepsy. The deal includes NRTX-1001, a neuronal cell therapy candidate currently in Phase I/II trials, which utilizes pluripotent stem cell technology to restore neural circuitry.
